name: TC Energy Corporation
description: TC Energy Corporation is a leading North American energy infrastructure company that specializes in the development and operation of natural gas pipelines and power generation facilities. With a vast network spanning Canada, the United States, and Mexico, the company transports a significant portion of the natural gas consumed across the continent. TC Energy is committed to safe, reliable operations and is increasingly focused on low-carbon energy solutions, including nuclear and renewable power, to meet the growing energy demands of homes and industries while maintaining a strong emphasis on sustainability and community engagement.
